title: Proclamation No. 408, s. 1957
text:
MALACAÑANG

RESIDENCE OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE PHILIPPINES MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 408

RESERVING FOR MUNICIPAL BUILDING SITE PURPOSES A CERTAIN PORTION OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DANAO, PROVINCE OF CEBU, ISLAND OF CEBU

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Natural Resources and pursuant to the provisions of section 83 of Commonwealth Act No. 141, as amended, I, Carlos P, Garcia, President of the Philippines, do hereby withdraw from sale and settlement and reserve for Municipal Building Site purposes under the administration of the municipality of Danao, subject to private rights, if any there be, a certain portion of the public domain situated in the municipality of Danao, provice of ,Cebu, island of Cebu, and more particularly described as follows, to wit:

Lot 1, Mr-1110 (The Municipal Government of Danao)

A parcel of land (lot 1 of plan Mr-1110), situated in the poblacion, municipality of Danao, province of Cebu., Bounded on the SE., along line 1-2, by property of the Municipal Government of Danao and property claimed by Pedro Sepulveda; along line, 2-3, by property; claimed; by Pedro Sepulveda, Jacinta Muñoz and Roque Jayson; along line 3-10, by lot 2 of plan Mr-1110; and along line 10-1, by provincial road. Beginning at a point marked 1 on plan, being N. 76° 01′ W., 35.44 meters from B.L.L.M. 1, municipality of, Danao, Cebu, thence S. 30° 00′ W., 100.62 meters to point 2; thence N. 57° 16′ W., 83.98 meters to point 3; thence N.23° 27′ E., 25.65 meters to point 4; thence N. 53° 09′ E., 30.64 meters to point 5; thence N. 67° 59′ E., 15.63 meters to point 6; thence N. 78° 00’ E.,16.11 meters, to point 7; thence S. 85° 06′ E., 9.84 meters to point 8; thence S. 76° 28′ E., 18.80 meters to point 9; thence N.37° 25′ E., 11.58 meters to point 10; thence S 57° 23′ E., 24.74 meters to the point of beginning; containing an area of 6,787 square meters. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and are marked on the ground by Old Points; bearings true:

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the, Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 11th day of April, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and fifty-seven, and of the Independence of the Philippines, the eleventh.

CARLOS P. GARCIA President of the Philippines

By the President:

FORTUNATO DE LEON Executive Secretary

Source: University of the Philippines, College of Law Library
